steps.title: Find the singular subject
steps.content: The subject is Mary Madden of Ohio, which names one person. The phrase of Ohio only describes Madden and does not make the subject plural.

steps.title: Match number and past time
steps.content: The verb must be singular to agree with the subject and past tense to fit the late-1800s context. A, C, and D are plural forms, so they break subject-verb agreement. The answer is B.
